commonProblems.h2: Nissan 240SX Engine Problems - What It Costs to Fix & When Replacement Makes Sense
commonProblems.h3: The Nissan 240SX's KA-series engines are robust but age-related failures drive replacement demand. Timing chain rattle, oil consumption, and overheating dominate enquiries for KA24DE units. Every rebuilt engine supplied through EngineMarket includes upgraded internal components designed to address the original failure point - plus a minimum 12-month unlimited mileage warranty.

problems.h4: Timing Chain Rattle - Why KA24DE Engines Fail Prematurely
problems.rootCause: Hydraulic tensioner wear allows chain slack, causing rattling on cold start and potential jump.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace tensioner, guides, chain before jump
repairOptions.longevity: Viable if caught early; 40k+ mile extension

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt KA24DE with upgraded tensioner

problems.recommendation: If your 240SX shows cold-start rattle below 80k miles, a preventative chain kit offers best value. Beyond 100k miles or with jump damage, replacement is more economical.
problems.cta: Compare rebuilt KA24DE engine prices for your Nissan 240SX

problems.h4: Oil Consumption - Piston Ring Wear on High-Mileage KA Units
problems.rootCause: Piston ring land wear allows oil past rings into combustion chamber, causing blue smoke.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Strip engine, replace rings, hone cylinders
repairOptions.longevity: Extends life 30-50k miles if block sound

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt unit with upgraded rings

problems.recommendation: On a 240SX valued under £3,000, ring replacement rarely pays. A rebuilt engine with upgraded components offers better long-term value and warranty protection.
problems.cta: Get quotes for oil-consumption fixed KA24DE engines

problems.h4: Overheating & Head Gasket Failure - Thermal Stress on KA Engines
problems.rootCause: Radiator clogging or water pump failure causes overheating; aluminium head warps, gasket fails.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Remove head, machine surface, fit MLS gasket
repairOptions.longevity: Viable if block undamaged; 40k+ mile extension

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt KA24DE with upgraded cooling
repairOptions.longevity: Best for high-mileage or warped head scenarios

problems.recommendation: If overheating caused visible damage or the head is warped beyond spec, replacement is safer and often cheaper than extensive machining.

problems.h4: Valve Clearance Noise - Tappet Wear on High-Mileage Units
problems.rootCause: Shim-under-bucket tappets wear, causing ticking noise and reduced performance.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Remove valve cover, measure clearances, fit new shims
Supply & fit rebuilt KA24DE-2 with pre-adjusted valvetrain
repairOptions.longevity: Best for engines with additional wear issues

problems.recommendation: Valve adjustment is cost-effective if the engine is otherwise healthy. If combined with oil consumption or timing issues, replacement offers better value.
problems.cta: Get quotes for pre-adjusted KA24DE-2 engines

finalCta.h4: Don't Let Engine Failure Write Off Your Nissan 240SX
finalCta.paragraph: Timing chain rattle, oil consumption, and overheating are the most common reasons Nissan 240SX owners seek replacement engines. EngineMarket makes it simple to compare prices from trusted UK specialists who supply rebuilt KA24DE units with upgraded components addressing these exact failure points. Every engine includes a minimum 12-month unlimited mileage warranty and nationwide delivery. Compare quotes today and get your 240SX back on the road without the main dealer premium.
finalCta.buttonText: Compare Nissan 240SX Engine Replacement Prices Now →
finalCta.disclaimer: All prices are indicative UK market ranges based on historical quote data and repair requests from our network of engine specialists. Dealer pricing is estimated based on published main dealer labour rates and genuine OEM parts pricing. Specialist pricing reflects actual quote data from EngineMarket's UK network. Actual costs vary depending on damage severity, vehicle condition, variant, and workshop location within the UK. Use our free comparison tool to get tailored quotes for your specific Nissan 240SX and engine code. Every engine supplied through EngineMarket carries a minimum 12-month unlimited mileage warranty - always confirm exact terms with your chosen supplier.

engineSizes.h2: Nissan 240SX Engines by Size - Find the Right Displacement for Your Variant
engineSizes.intro: Every displacement fitted to the Nissan 240SX is listed below, with compatible engine codes, production years and common failure notes to help you identify the right replacement.

items.title: Nissan 240SX 2.4L Petrol Engines
items.description: The 2.4-litre KA-series inline-four powered every UK-market Nissan 240SX from 1989 to 1998. Available in SOHC KA24E (early S13) and DOHC KA24DE (late S13/S14) forms, this durable cast-iron block engine delivers reliable performance for daily driving and enthusiast builds alike.

items.title: Nissan 240SX 2.0L Petrol Engines
items.description: The 2.0-litre SR20DET is not factory-fitted to UK 240SX models but is the most popular JDM swap for performance builds. Turbocharged and producing 200-250 hp, it requires standalone ECU and wiring modifications for UK road use. Not sure which engine size your Nissan 240SX needs? Enter your registration number above - we'll identify the exact displacement, engine code and compatible replacement options instantly. All engines supplied through EngineMarket include a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty from UK Nissan 240SX specialists.

engineYears.h2: Nissan 240SX Engines by Year - What Was Fitted & When
engineYears.intro: This section covers all major engine changes across the Nissan 240SX production timeline (1989-1998), organised so owners can quickly identify their engine and compare rebuilt prices from UK specialists.

years.description: The first UK-market 240SX models used the SOHC KA24E, a robust but less powerful precursor to the DOHC units that followed.
keyChanges: Launch of Nissan 240SX S13 chassis in UK as grey import
KA24E SOHC 12-valve engine fitted to base and SE trims
knownFor: Robust SOHC design with simple maintenance
Lower power output than later DOHC revisions
years.cta: Get quotes for 1989-1990 Nissan 240SX replacement engines

years.description: The 1991 model year introduced the DOHC KA24DE, becoming the definitive 240SX engine across S13 hatchback, coupe and convertible variants.
keyChanges: Minor revisions to oil pump and timing components (KA24DE-1)
mainEngines: KA24DE - 2.4L petrol (S13 SE / S13 LE / S13 Coupe / S13 Hatchback)
knownFor: Improved power and responsiveness over KA24E
Timing chain tensioner wear emerges as common failure
Strong enthusiast following for drift and tuning
years.cta: Get quotes for 1991-1994 Nissan 240SX replacement engines
years.ticker: S13 240SX KA24DE engine replacement • Timing chain rattle fix UK • KA24DE oil consumption repair

years.description: The S14 chassis brought styling updates and late-model KA24DE-2 revisions with improved emissions compliance and oiling for final production years.
keyChanges: S14 chassis replaces S13 for 1994 model year
KA24DE-2 revision introduced for 1997 Kouki facelift
Revised ECU mapping and mounting points for S14
mainEngines: KA24DE - 2.4L petrol (S14 Base / S14 SE / S14 LE)
knownFor: Valve clearance adjustment required at higher mileage
Final production years command collector interest
years.cta: Get quotes for 1994-1998 Nissan 240SX replacement engines
years.ticker: S14 240SX KA24DE engine replacement • Kouki facelift engine compatibility • KA24DE-2 valve adjustment service

faq.h2: Nissan 240SX Engine Replacement - Frequently Asked Questions

items.question: How much does a Nissan 240SX engine replacement cost UK?
items.answer: A rebuilt KA24DE engine for the Nissan 240SX typically costs £850-£2,400 supply-only in the UK, with supply & fit adding £400-£800 labour depending on location and transmission type.
keyPoints: Rebuilt KA24DE units range £850-£2,400 supply-only
Supply & fit labour adds £400-£800 typically
Used engines available from £750 but vary in condition
Warranty terms significantly impact final price
items.cta: Compare rebuilt KA24DE engine prices for your Nissan 240SX

items.question: What engine codes fit the Nissan 240SX?
items.answer: Factory-fitted codes are KA24E (1989-1990) and KA24DE/KA24DE-1/KA24DE-2 (1991-1998). SR20DET and CA18DET are popular JDM swap options requiring modifications.
keyPoints: KA24E: early S13 SOHC 12-valve (1989-1990)
KA24DE series: DOHC 16-valve (1991-1998)
SR20DET: turbo swap, requires standalone ECU
Enter reg above to verify your exact engine code
items.cta: Get quotes for your specific Nissan 240SX engine code

items.question: Is a reconditioned Nissan 240SX engine reliable?
items.answer: Yes, when sourced from a reputable UK specialist. Reconditioned KA24DE engines include new gaskets, seals and timing components, with dyno testing and a 12-month warranty.
keyPoints: Reconditioned units undergo full strip and rebuild
Upgraded timing tensioners address common failures
Dyno-tested before dispatch for peace of mind
12-month unlimited mileage warranty standard

items.question: Can I fit a turbo engine to my Nissan 240SX?
items.answer: Yes, the SR20DET is the most popular turbo swap for the 240SX, but requires standalone ECU, wiring modifications and may need IVA documentation for UK road use.
keyPoints: SR20DET produces 200-250 hp with turbo
Standalone ECU and wiring harness required
IVA test may be needed for grey import compliance
Specialist installation recommended for reliability
items.cta: Enquire about SR20DET swap engine availability UK

items.question: How long does Nissan 240SX engine delivery take UK?
items.answer: Most rebuilt KA24DE engines dispatch within 3-5 working days, with next-day delivery available to most UK mainland locations. Supply & fit bookings depend on specialist availability.
keyPoints: Rebuilt engines typically dispatch in 3-5 days
Next-day delivery available to most UK postcodes
Supply & fit booking depends on local specialist
Core return collection arranged post-installation
items.cta: Check live delivery times for your Nissan 240SX engine

items.question: Do you supply Nissan 240SX engines with warranty?
items.answer: Yes, every engine supplied through EngineMarket includes a minimum 12-month unlimited mileage warranty from UK specialists, with extended options available for rebuilt and remanufactured units.
keyPoints: Minimum 12-month unlimited mileage warranty
Covers parts and labour for warranty claims
Extended warranty options on premium rebuilds
Warranty transferable on vehicle sale
items.cta: View warranty terms for Nissan 240SX engine replacements

items.question: What's included with a Nissan 240SX reconditioned engine?
items.answer: A reconditioned KA24DE includes new gaskets, seals, timing chain kit, oil pump inspection and compression testing. Some suppliers include upgraded tensioners addressing common failures.
keyPoints: New gaskets, seals and timing components
Compression and leak-down testing before dispatch
Upgraded tensioner often fitted as standard
Full documentation for DVLA and MOT purposes
items.cta: Compare what's included with Nissan 240SX recon engines

items.question: Can I return my old Nissan 240SX engine for credit?
items.answer: Yes, most suppliers offer core return collection with a refundable core charge (£100-£300) when your old KA24DE is returned in rebuildable condition.
keyPoints: Core charge refund typically £100-£300
Collection arranged post-installation
Engine must be complete and rebuildable
Environmentally responsible recycling ensured
items.cta: Learn about core return for your Nissan 240SX engine

items.question: Will a replacement engine pass my Nissan 240SX MOT?
items.answer: Yes, provided the replacement KA24DE matches your V5C engine number or is properly documented with DVLA. Emissions must meet original specification for your model year.
keyPoints: Engine number must match V5C or be updated
Emissions must meet original model-year spec
DVLA notification required for engine change
Specialist documentation supports MOT compliance

items.question: How do I know which Nissan 240SX engine I need?
items.answer: Enter your registration above for instant DVLA verification of your exact engine code, variant and compatible replacements. Our specialists can also confirm fitment via photos of your engine stamp.
